evals.prompt: Use the Clash of Coins skill to help me browse everything available on https://x402.clashofcoins.com and suggest one sale option and one shop option.
evals.expected_output: Starts from live discovery and GET /catalog, separates sale and shop surfaces, and proposes next endpoints without mixing contracts.
assertions: The response names exactly one origin and keeps all route examples on that origin
The response explicitly starts with GET /catalog before purchase routing
The response distinguishes sale and shop as separate checkout surfaces
The response includes at least one sale endpoint under /agentic/* and one shop endpoint under /shop/*

evals.prompt: I want to buy a presale lot with x402. Tell me exactly which discovery and buy endpoints to call, and what payload fields are required.
evals.expected_output: Uses sale-only flow with protocol-aware discovery and correct sale buy payload fields.
assertions: The response uses sale routes under /agentic/* for quote and buy
The response includes saleId, quantity, and beneficiary in the payload guidance
The response states that unpaid and paid retry payloads must remain identical
The response avoids using /shop/* buy routes for this task

evals.prompt: I need to buy game keys for nickname PlayerOne. Show me the safest shop flow.
evals.expected_output: Uses shop flow with recipient validation, quote or buy routes, and status polling.
assertions: The response uses /shop/* routes for quote and buy
The response states that shop quote/buy requires exactly one recipient identifier
The response includes at least one shop status endpoint
The response does not suggest sale /agentic/* routes for item delivery

evals.prompt: I am integrating a scanner. Validate that discovery docs, OpenAPI, and skills metadata are consistent.
evals.expected_output: Runs an integration validation checklist covering mcp.json, skills index, openapi variants, and mismatch reporting.
assertions: The response includes /mcp.json and /skills/index.json in the validation path
The response distinguishes protocol-aware /openapi.json from full /openapi.full.json
The response includes route-level mismatch reporting requirements
The response avoids claiming success without endpoint-level evidence

evals.prompt: Assume this deployment is mpp-only. Give me a robust plan for sale and shop without x402 assumptions.
evals.expected_output: Builds a plan that uses only mpp routes and discovery checks, and explicitly avoids x402-only assumptions.
assertions: The response verifies protocol availability from live .well-known discovery
The response avoids requiring x402 routes when mpp-only is stated
The response recommends mppx for MPP payment retries
The response keeps sale and shop purchase routes distinct
